summary: PWA features testing completed for Little Eat Italy restaurant admin. All PWA assets (manifest.json, service-worker.js, notification.mp3, icons) are accessible. Admin login, shop admin page with LIVE indicator, sound toggle, 4-second polling, and mobile responsive layout all working correctly.
passed_tests: PWA: manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with correct config (200 OK)
PWA: manifest.json has all required icon sizes (72x72 to 512x512)
PWA: service-worker.js accessible at /service-worker.js (200 OK)
PWA: notification.mp3 accessible at /sounds/notification.mp3 (200 OK)
PWA: All 8 icon sizes accessible at /icons/icon-{size}.png (200 OK)
Auth: Admin login works with username: admin, password: LittleEatItaly2024! (200 OK)
Auth: Invalid credentials properly rejected (401)
Auth: Token verification endpoint works (200 OK)
Auth: Protected endpoints require authentication (401/403)
API: GET /api/shop/orders returns orders list (200 OK)
API: GET /api/shop/reservations returns reservations list (200 OK)
API: GET /api/shop/menu returns menu with categories (200 OK)
API: GET /api/shop/settings returns settings (200 OK)
Polling: Concurrent polling requests work correctly
UI: Login page (/admin) displays correctly with German text
UI: Shop Admin page (/admin/shop) shows LIVE indicator
UI: Sound toggle button visible and functional
UI: '4 Sekunden' polling text visible
UI: All 4 tabs visible (BESTELLUNGEN, RESERVIERUNGEN, MENÜ, EINSTELLUNGEN)
UI: Stat cards show order/reservation counts
UI: Mobile responsive layout (390x844) works correctly
UI: Tablet responsive layout (768x1024) works correctly
Service Worker: Registered successfully on page load
critical_code_review_comments: PWA implementation is complete and functional
Service worker registers correctly for offline caching
Polling mechanism properly fetches orders/reservations every 4 seconds
Sound notification hook (useNotificationSound) properly handles audio playback
Email notifications via Resend are MOCKED (no RESEND_API_KEY configured)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA implementation fully tested. Features verified: 1) manifest.json with all icons at /manifest.json 2) service-worker.js at /service-worker.js 3) notification.mp3 at /sounds/notification.mp3 4) Shop admin page at /admin/shop with LIVE indicator, 4-second polling, sound toggle 5) Mobile responsive layout. All endpoints working correctly for polling mechanism.

pwa_features_verified.manifest: Correct config with start_url=/admin/shop, display=standalone, all icons defined
pwa_features_verified.service_worker: Registers correctly, caches static assets, excludes API calls from cache
pwa_features_verified.live_indicator: Green dot with LIVE text visible on shop admin page
pwa_features_verified.sound_toggle: Speaker icon button visible and clickable
